---
name: "⚡ Performance Issue"
about: Report slow performance, high resource usage, or efficiency problems
title: "[PERF] "
labels: performance
assignees: seldonrios

---

## ⚡ Summary
Describe the performance problem clearly.

Examples:
- Slow response time
- High CPU / GPU / RAM usage
- Long startup time
- Workflow lag
- Memory leak
- Slow indexing / retrieval
- Delayed automation execution

---

## 🎯 Expected Performance
What did you expect instead?

Examples:
- Response within a few seconds
- Lower memory usage
- Smooth UI interaction
- Faster task execution

---

## ❌ Observed Performance Issue
What actually happened?

Include any measurable symptoms:
- response time
- startup time
- resource spikes
- freezes / stutters
- timeouts

---

## 🔁 Steps to Reproduce
How can this be reproduced?

1. Start '...'
2. Open / run '...'
3. Trigger '...'
4. Observe slowdown / resource spike

---

## 🧠 Environment
Please provide as much relevant detail as possible:

- OS:
- CPU:
- GPU:
- RAM:
- Storage type:
- Runtime / language version:
- Deployment type: [local / server / container]
- Branch / commit / version:

---

## 🧩 Affected Area
Check all that apply:

- [ ] Core system
- [ ] AI / reasoning engine
- [ ] Memory system
- [ ] Retrieval / indexing
- [ ] Automation / workflows
- [ ] API / backend
- [ ] Frontend / UI
- [ ] Integration layer
- [ ] Startup / install process
- [ ] Other: _______

---

## 📊 Measurements / Benchmarks
If available, provide numbers:

- Time to reproduce:
- Avg response time:
- Peak CPU:
- Peak GPU:
- Peak RAM:
- Disk / network activity:
- Number of modules / agents active:

---

## 📸 Logs / Screenshots / Profiling Output
Paste logs or profiling output here.

```text
Paste logs, benchmark output, or profiling details here
```

---

## 🔄 Frequency
How often does this occur?

- [ ] Always
- [ ] Often
- [ ] Sometimes
- [ ] Rarely

---

## 🛠️ Workarounds Tried
List anything that improves or changes the issue:
- disabling modules
- reducing data size
- restarting services
- changing model / config
- using different hardware

---

## 📈 Impact
What is the severity?

- [ ] 🔴 Critical — system unusable
- [ ] 🟠 High — major slowdown
- [ ] 🟡 Medium — noticeable issue
- [ ] 🟢 Low — minor degradation

---

## 🧪 Additional Context
Anything else that might help identify the bottleneck?
